item.title: Why Can't I Hear Without Subtitles?
item.description: If you've ever found yourself turning on subtitles even when the volume is fine, you're not alone. This explores why some people process spoken information more easily when they can both hear and read it at the same time.

media:content.media:title: Why Can't I Hear Without Subtitles?
media:content.media:description: If you've ever found yourself turning on subtitles even when the volume is fine, you're not alone. This explores why some people process spoken information more easily when they can both hear and read it at the same time.

item.title: A Parenting Moment Over a TV Remote
item.description: A parent reflects on a tense moment with a child over a TV remote.

media:content.media:title: A Parenting Moment Over a TV Remote
media:content.media:description: A parent reflects on a tense moment with a child over a TV remote.

item.title: A system built around one sound
item.description: A lighthearted look at building a whole system for one sound, shared as a relatable brain flex.

media:content.media:title: A system built around one sound
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted look at building a whole system for one sound, shared as a relatable brain flex.

item.title: A simple tip for low-focus days
item.description: A quick reminder for the days your brain feels slippery.

media:content.media:title: A simple tip for low-focus days
media:content.media:description: A quick reminder for the days your brain feels slippery.

item.title: A message for the right audience
item.description: Sometimes the people who need to hear something most are the ones who instantly understand it. If this message resonates, it may be exactly the reminder you needed today.

media:content.media:title: A message for the right audience
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the people who need to hear something most are the ones who instantly understand it. If this message resonates, it may be exactly the reminder you needed today.

item.title: When your brain feels underwater
item.description: A simple, relatable take on how ADHD can feel hard to describe, using the most fitting language.

media:content.media:title: When your brain feels underwater
media:content.media:description: A simple, relatable take on how ADHD can feel hard to describe, using the most fitting language.

item.title: Why ADHD Parents Lose Their Temper
item.description: A look at why some parents with ADHD may struggle with patience, even while deeply loving their kids.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Parents Lose Their Temper
media:content.media:description: A look at why some parents with ADHD may struggle with patience, even while deeply loving their kids.

item.title: Why am I late if I was ready?
item.description: You planned the outfit, remembered the details, and got everything together... except the one thing that mattered most: the time. A relatable look at how ADHD can make time management harder than it seems.

media:content.media:title: Why am I late if I was ready?
media:content.media:description: You planned the outfit, remembered the details, and got everything together... except the one thing that mattered most: the time. A relatable look at how ADHD can make time management harder than it seems.

item.title: Food Is for Survival, Not Optimization
item.description: Food doesn't have to be perfect to be valuable. A reminder that eating is about nourishment and survival, not constantly optimizing every meal or making perfect choices.

media:content.media:title: Food Is for Survival, Not Optimization
media:content.media:description: Food doesn't have to be perfect to be valuable. A reminder that eating is about nourishment and survival, not constantly optimizing every meal or making perfect choices.

item.title: Psychiatrist with ADHD on pre-TED Talk nerves
item.description: Being a psychiatrist doesn't make you immune to anxiety, self-doubt, or ADHD overwhelm. A personal look at what happened before a TED Talk and the reality of managing ADHD under pressure.

media:content.media:title: Psychiatrist with ADHD on pre-TED Talk nerves
media:content.media:description: Being a psychiatrist doesn't make you immune to anxiety, self-doubt, or ADHD overwhelm. A personal look at what happened before a TED Talk and the reality of managing ADHD under pressure.

item.title: Signs of high-achieving ADHD
item.description: ADHD doesn't always look like falling behind. Many high-achievers develop systems that help them succeed while quietly struggling with overwhelm, burnout, procrastination, or emotional regulation behind the scenes.

media:content.media:title: Signs of high-achieving ADHD
media:content.media:description: ADHD doesn't always look like falling behind. Many high-achievers develop systems that help them succeed while quietly struggling with overwhelm, burnout, procrastination, or emotional regulation behind the scenes.

item.title: When rejection feels overwhelming
item.description: For some people, rejection or criticism can trigger an intense emotional and physical response that feels far bigger than the moment itself. This explores why those feelings can be so overwhelming and difficult to shake.

media:content.media:title: When rejection feels overwhelming
media:content.media:description: For some people, rejection or criticism can trigger an intense emotional and physical response that feels far bigger than the moment itself. This explores why those feelings can be so overwhelming and difficult to shake.

item.title: Why ADHD Women Struggle at Home
item.description: A look at why some women with ADHD feel overwhelmed after getting home and how daily demands can build up.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Women Struggle at Home
media:content.media:description: A look at why some women with ADHD feel overwhelmed after getting home and how daily demands can build up.

item.title: How One Comment Can Affect Your Week
item.description: Sometimes a single comment can stick with you far longer than expected. This explores why certain remarks carry so much emotional weight and how they can influence your thoughts, mood, and confidence for days afterward.

media:content.media:title: How One Comment Can Affect Your Week
media:content.media:description: Sometimes a single comment can stick with you far longer than expected. This explores why certain remarks carry so much emotional weight and how they can influence your thoughts, mood, and confidence for days afterward.

item.title: What it’s like being a woman psychiatrist
item.description: A personal look at the unique experiences, challenges, and perspectives that can come with working as a woman in psychiatry and mental health care.

media:content.media:title: What it’s like being a woman psychiatrist
media:content.media:description: A personal look at the unique experiences, challenges, and perspectives that can come with working as a woman in psychiatry and mental health care.

item.title: ADHD Medication: Staying Informed
item.description: A look at ADHD medications, how they differ, and why it helps to stay up to date on what they do and where they may fall short.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Medication: Staying Informed
media:content.media:description: A look at ADHD medications, how they differ, and why it helps to stay up to date on what they do and where they may fall short.

item.title: She Can Run a Company, But Can't Open One Letter
item.description: A look at how ADHD can create surprising challenges with everyday tasks, even for highly capable and successful people. Sometimes the smallest tasks can feel harder than the biggest responsibilities.

media:content.media:title: She Can Run a Company, But Can't Open One Letter
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD can create surprising challenges with everyday tasks, even for highly capable and successful people. Sometimes the smallest tasks can feel harder than the biggest responsibilities.
